LanguageData.UB_BTC_ScarletCrusader01.title: scarlet crusader
LanguageData.UB_BTC_ScarletCrusader02.title: scarlet purifier
LanguageData.UB_BTC_ScarletCrusader03.title: scarlet defender
LanguageData.UB_BTC_ScarletCrusader04.title: scarlet bishop
LanguageData.UB_BTC_TheHound.title: noble’s dog
LanguageData.UB_BTC_ScarletCrusader01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] waged war against the shamblers—cursed undead that mocked the purity of life. \nWith fire and steel, [PAWN_pronoun] struck them down, seeking to cleanse the world of their corruption.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_ScarletCrusader02.description: [PAWN_nameDef] waged war against the shamblers—cursed undead that mocked the purity of life. \nWith fire and steel, [PAWN_pronoun] struck them down, seeking to cleanse the world of their corruption.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_ScarletCrusader03.description: [PAWN_nameDef] waged war against the shamblers—cursed undead that mocked the purity of life. \nWith fire and steel, [PAWN_pronoun] struck them down, seeking to cleanse the world of their corruption.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_ScarletCrusader04.description: [PAWN_nameDef] waged war against the shamblers—cursed undead that mocked the purity of life. \nWith fire and steel, [PAWN_pronoun] struck them down, seeking to cleanse the world of their corruption.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_TheHound.description: [PAWN_nameDef] waged war against the shamblers—cursed undead that mocked the purity of life. \nWith fire and steel, [PAWN_pronoun] struck them down, seeking to cleanse the world of their corruption.
